currentArchitectureSummary.primaryKey: ingredients.id (uuid) — single canonical row per user catalog entry

provenIdentityWeaknesses.title: Single ingredient_id collapses incompatible pack formats
provenIdentityWeaknesses.rootCause: Token match on 'mozzarella fior di latte' without persisted pack-format contract; ingredients.current_price last-write-wins across formats

provenIdentityWeaknesses.title: Fresh vs preserved forms share one ingredient_id
provenIdentityWeaknesses.rootCause: Name token 'pepino' matches conserva catalog row; no form/preservation dimension in schema or history chain guard

provenIdentityWeaknesses.title: price_history previous_price chains across any prior invoice for same ingredient_id

evidence.vlImpact: Mozzarella and Pepino false movement signals propagate to opportunities

provenIdentityWeaknesses.rootCause: No check that prior and new purchase_quantity / pack semantics are equivalent before computing delta

provenIdentityWeaknesses.title: Rich identity signals not persisted — recomputed per match

evidence.parentForm: PARENT_FORM_HIERARCHY_FAMILIES = cheddar only — mozzarella/cheese block vs piece not covered

provenIdentityWeaknesses.rootCause: Match-time scoring cannot enforce downstream pricing equivalence after match is confirmed

provenIdentityWeaknesses.title: Aliases map invoice wording → ingredient_id without pack-format metadata

evidence.vlUnmatched: 46/51 VL lines unmatched — limited alias coverage

provenIdentityWeaknesses.rootCause: Alias confirms identity of catalog row, not which purchase format that supplier line represents

provenIdentityWeaknesses.title: Ginger Beer — packaging token parse failure (orthogonal but compounds identity gap)
provenIdentityWeaknesses.rootCause: 0.20cl parsed as 0.2 CL not 20cl; line also unmatched — no SKU identity to attach correct volume

impactOnPricingOpportunities.summary: Pricing math is sound; identity collapse poisons inputs
impactOnPricingOpportunities.mechanism: ingredient_price_history stores operational €/base-unit per ingredient_id; opportunities use priceHistoryDeltaPct without format equivalence gate

impactOnSupplierIntelligence.summary: Supplier metrics aggregate by ingredient_id — pack-mixed histories produce false spikes and switch recommendations
impactOnSupplierIntelligence.mechanism: buildSupplierIntelligence filters priceHistory by ingredient_id; compares latestUnit vs avg3mo and min90d without pack normalization guard
impactOnSupplierIntelligence.vlExample: Mozzarella: Bocconcino €0.95/piece history vs Aviludo €13.69/block appears as massive inflation and false 'better supplier' signal

impactOnPrepSubRecipes.summary: Recipes bind to ingredient_id; current_price is single-valued — last matched invoice overwrites pack economics for all recipes
impactOnPrepSubRecipes.mechanism: recipe_ingredients.ingredient_id → ingredients.current_price / purchase_quantity; effectiveUnitCost uses catalog row only
impactOnPrepSubRecipes.subRecipes: sub_recipe_id references recipes(id) — prep identity is separate from ingredient pack identity (good) but leaf ingredients still suffer W1/W2
impactOnPrepSubRecipes.risk: Recipe costing for mozzarella-heavy dishes drifts when unrelated pack format invoice syncs same ingredient_id

impactOnPurchaseHistory.summary: Purchase history is invoice-linked but keyed only by ingredient_id; no per-SKU ledger
impactOnPurchaseHistory.mechanism: appendIngredientPriceHistoryFromInvoiceLine on match persist; one row per (invoice_id, ingredient_id)
impactOnPurchaseHistory.ghostRows: 14 rows flagged ghost in VL — prior line wording no longer on invoice but history persists on same ID

sufficiencyVerdict.supplierIntelligence: INSUFFICIENT — same ID mixes incompatible economics
sufficiencyVerdict.purchaseHistory: PARTIAL — auditable per invoice but not per SKU
sufficiencyVerdict.prepSubRecipes: PARTIAL — sub-recipe graph OK; leaf ingredient economics ambiguous
